SEE IT IN ACTION

Smart living,
beautifully demonstrated.

Take a closer look at the OHOME — a factory-built secondary dwelling engineered for the way we live now.

One home.
Designed your way.

Custom-engineered furniture and integrated smart technology make 60 sqm feel closer to 100 sqm of fully liveable space. Every room transforms to match how you live — morning to night.

Lounge Mode
Zen Mode
Movie Mode
Work Mode
Rest Mode

Beautifully designed.
Born smart.

A 60 sqm secondary dwelling engineered for adaptability — Scandinavian design, biophilic finishes, and a fully integrated smart living system powered by LG ThinQ. Everything included as standard.

01
Smart Home OS

LG ThinQ integrated ecosystem — climate, lighting, appliances and security working as one intuitive system.

02
Dynamic Living Spaces

Two personal spaces transform between Lounge, Rest and Work modes via bespoke OHOME furniture.

03
7-Star+ Energy Design

NCC-aligned thermal efficiency. Double-glazed full-height windows. Solar and battery ready as standard.

04
Fully Furnished Turnkey

Drift Lounge, Elevate Desk, LG Smart TV and all major appliances — included. Move in immediately.

05
Premium Kitchen

Stone benchtops, integrated LG appliances, smart extraction rangehood and fold-out dine-in island.

06
Factory Precision Built

237 quality-assurance checkpoints. Engineered heavy-duty steel structure with a 10-year structural warranty.

FLOOR PLAN — OHOME 062

Engineered for
every way of living.

The 60 sqm floor plan is built around an intelligent central service core — kitchen, bathroom and laundry — flanked by two fully adaptable personal living spaces. Six configurations available.

  • Total floor area60 sqm
  • Footprint10.5 m × 9 m
  • Ceiling height2.6 metres
  • Personal living spaces2 × 3.5 m
  • Configurations6 available
  • Optional roof deckSolar panel area

Your home.
We handle everything else.

Three steps. Six months. Keys in hand. The most effortless way to own a home in Australia.

01
Design it

Choose your layout, finishes and style. Takes about twenty minutes. No architect needed. No guesswork.

02
We build it

Factory precision. 237 quality checkpoints. Council approvals handled end-to-end. You don't lift a finger.

03
Move in

We deliver, install and connect everything. Two weeks on-site. Six months from order. Fully furnished. Ready to live in.
